OneKey Payments is a regional payment solutions provider connecting businesses to local payment methods across key LATAM markets, combining local execution with regional scale.

Contact Us

PAYMENT INFRASTRUCTURE DESIGNED TO OPERATE ACROSS LATIN AMERICA

Seamless Payments

we deliver fast, secure payment SOLUTIONS for businesses locally and beyond.

OneKey Payments operates regulated payment services across multiple Latin American countries, supported by local licenses, registrations and regulatory frameworks under a regional compliance structure.

Powerful Solutions

OUR OFFER

PAYINS
Simplify BUSINESS transactions

Connect to over 300 alternative payment methods, card processing, and international transfers. We deliver tailored solutions designed to meet your payment needs and drive your business forward.

Discover More
PAYOUTS
Streamlined Monetization

Enable quick payment distribution for prizes, rewards, and remittances, with bank transfers completed in under 2 hours, 7 days a week.

Enhance
Compliance

Stay ahead of financial risks with strong identity verification. Our KYC solutions ensure regulatory compliance while protecting against fraud and money laundering.

BOOST PAYMENTS
Optimize Payment Traffic

Our smart routing feature splits merchant traffic across various providers, ensuring efficiency and reliability in every transaction.

Compliance and Local Regulations
Compliance & Local Regulations Made Easy

From Know Your Customer (KYC) protocols to data protection and financial reporting standards, we ensure everything is covered to keep your business running smoothly and securely.

WORLDWIDE Coverage

LOCAL KNOWLEDGE,
‍REGIONAL REACH

OneKey Payments enables local businesses to process payments seamlessly across borders. With support for multiple payment methods like Pix, Boleto, Spei, Webpai, Bre-b and more, we ensure full compliance transactions for merchants and customers worldwide.

Easy Integrations

Seamless API Integration

Integrate effortlessly with our APIs for a smooth payment processing experience.

Our latest Deposits API is focused on simplicity, usability and personalization and it is used to allow your customers to deposit with their local payment methods of preference.

Technical Docs

Why Us

Trusted Payment Solutions Provider

Processing Speed and 24/7 Monitoring

Cash-ins and cash-outs in seconds, with 24/7 monitoring to address any bank performance issues instantly.

Processing Speed and 24/7 Monitoring

Cash-ins and cash-outs in seconds, with 24/7 monitoring to address any bank performance issues instantly.

Instant Support and Resolution

Our automated SLA system provides immediate responses for critical cases like payment delays or third-party refunds, ensuring swift and efficient resolution.

Processing Speed and 24/7 Monitoring

Cash-ins and cash-outs in seconds, with 24/7 monitoring to address any bank performance issues instantly.

Instant Support and Resolution

Our automated SLA system provides immediate responses for critical cases like payment delays or third-party refunds, ensuring swift and efficient resolution.

Regulatory Compliance Made Simple

We ensure client funds are securely segregated, enable automated registration of up to three cash-out accounts, and provide real-time fee transparency through your dashboard.

MAIN OKP Capabilities

PIX KEY VALIDATION

Automatic validation of Pix keys and associated banking details.

PAYMENT REDUNDANCY

Direct connection with BACEN and multiple PIX providers ensures uninterrupted operation.

AUTOMATED E2E WORKFLOW

Automatic validation of Pix keys and associated banking details.

ADVANCED ANTI-FRAUD

Real-time monitoring, CPF validation, underage blocking, and automatic rejection of non-compliant accounts.
